nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy. Low around 34, with temperatures rising to around 37 overnight. Southeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 60, with temperatures falling to around 58 in the afternoon. South wind 15 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 50 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Patchy Blowing Snow
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then rain and snow showers likely between midnight and 2am, then patchy blowing snow and rain and snow showers likely. Cloudy. Low around 23, with temperatures rising to around 28 overnight. West wind 20 to 30 mph, with gusts as high as 50 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Snow Showers Likely And Patchy Blowing Snow
nws.detailedForecast: Snow showers likely and patchy blowing snow. Cloudy, with a high near 24. West northwest wind 25 to 30 mph, with gusts as high as 45 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Snow Showers And Patchy Blowing Snow then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow showers and patchy blowing snow before 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 12. West northwest wind 15 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 27.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Snow showers likely after 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 22. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow showers likely before 7am, then a slight chance of rain and snow showers between 7am and 1pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 44. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34.
